description_long: This radio receiver features a robust, rectangular metal housing with a dark olive-green finish, accented by two large analog meter displays on the front panel. The front face also includes a series of rotary knobs and switches beneath the meters, likely for tuning and adjusting various settings. Ventilation grilles are present on both side panels, suggesting internal components that require cooling. The top surface is adorned with two colorful, worn stickers, adding a touch of personalization and wear. The overall construction appears industrial and durable, with visible screws and reinforced corners. The object exudes a utilitarian, vintage aesthetic, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban utility spaces.
description: A rugged, olive-green metal radio receiver with dual analog meters, rotary knobs, side ventilation grilles, and worn stickers on top.
description_view_0: The front view shows two large analog meters, several rotary knobs, and a horizontal handle below the controls.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the prominent ventilation grille and the edge of the top stickers.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain, unadorned metal panel with two stickers visible on the top surface.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, featuring another ventilation grille and the continuation of the top stickers.
